languages.original_text: "Primitive cults. Meaningless, pointless squabbling. Oh yes, and some highly amusing attempts to cope with this world in their own pathetic mon-keigh way. What say you, Outcast?"

languages.text: "Примитивные культы, бессмысленная и бесцельная грызня между собой... Ах да, и весьма забавные попытки сладить с этим миром на свой умилительный монкайский манер. Что скажешь, изгой?"
languages.translation_comment: characters inspect the camp of unfamiliar guardsmen

languages.text: "Primitive cults. Meaningless, pointless squabbling. Oh yes, and some highly amusing attempts to cope with this world in their own pathetic mon-keigh way. What say you, Outcast?"

traits.locale_text: "Primitive cults. Meaningless, pointless squabbling. Oh yes, and some highly amusing attempts to cope with this world in their own pathetic mon-keigh way. What say you, Outcast?"
"Primitive cults. Meaningless, pointless squabbling. Oh yes, and some highly amusing attempts to cope with this world in their own pathetic mon-keigh way. What say you, Outcast?"
"Primitive cults. Meaningless, pointless squabbling. Oh yes, and some highly amusing attempts to cope with this world in their own pathetic mon-keigh way. What say you, Outcast?"

languages.text: 「原始的な儀式。意味のない、無駄な争い。ああ、そして、この世界に自分たちの哀れなモンキー方式で対処しようとする、非常に面白い試みもね。どう思うかい、アウトキャスト？」
languages.original_text: "Primitive cults. Meaningless, pointless squabbling. Oh yes, and some highly amusing attempts to cope with this world in their own pathetic mon-keigh way. What say you, Outcast?"

traits.locale_text: 「原始的な儀式。意味のない、無駄な争い。ああ、そして、この世界に自分たちの哀れなモンキー・キー方式で対処しようとする、非常に面白い試みもね。どう思うかい、アウトキャスト？」

languages.text: « Des cultes primitifs. Des querelles sans intérêt et vides de sens. Ah oui, et des efforts extrêmement amusants pour tenter, à leur façon pathétique de mon-keigh, de s'adapter à ce monde. Qu'en dites-vous, Errante ? »
languages.original_text: "Primitive cults. Meaningless, pointless squabbling. Oh yes, and some highly amusing attempts to cope with this world in their own pathetic mon-keigh way. What say you, Outcast?"

traits.locale_text: « Des cultes primitifs. Des querelles sans intérêt et vides de sens. Ah oui, et des efforts extrêmement amusants pour tenter, à leur façon pathétique de mon-keigh, de s'adapter à ce monde. Qu'en dites-vous, Errante ? »

languages.text: "Primitive Kulte. Bedeutungsloses Geschwätz. Oh, ja, und einige ausgesprochen amüsante Versuche, dieser Welt auf die armselige Art der Chem-Pan-Sey gerecht zu werden. Was sagt Ihr, Ausgestoßene?"
languages.original_text: "Primitive cults. Meaningless, pointless squabbling. Oh yes, and some highly amusing attempts to cope with this world in their own pathetic mon-keigh way. What say you, Outcast?"

traits.locale_text: "Primitive Kulte. Bedeutungsloses Geschwätz. Oh, ja, und einige ausgesprochen amüsante Versuche, dieser Welt auf die armselige Art der Chem-Pan-Sey gerecht zu werden. Was sagt Ihr, Ausgestoßene?"

languages.text: "İlkel tarikatlar. Anlamsız, boş çekişmeler. Bu dünyayla kendi acınası mon-keigh yöntemleriyle başa çıkmak için son derece eğlenceli girişimler. Ne diyorsun Yurtsuz?"
languages.original_text: "Primitive cults. Meaningless, pointless squabbling. Oh yes, and some highly amusing attempts to cope with this world in their own pathetic mon-keigh way. What say you, Outcast?"

traits.locale_text: "İlkel tarikatlar. Anlamsız, boş çekişmeler. Bu dünyayla kendi acınası mon-keigh yöntemleriyle başa çıkmak için son derece eğlenceli girişimler. Ne diyorsun Yurtsuz?"

languages.text: «Cultos primitivos. Disputas insignificantes e irrelevantes. Ah, sí, y algún que otro desternillante intento por habitar este mundo con el patetismo propio de los mon-keigh. ¿Tú qué opinas, proscrita?».
languages.original_text: "Primitive cults. Meaningless, pointless squabbling. Oh yes, and some highly amusing attempts to cope with this world in their own pathetic mon-keigh way. What say you, Outcast?"

traits.locale_text: «Cultos primitivos. Disputas insignificantes e irrelevantes. Ah, sí, y algún que otro desternillante intento por habitar este mundo con el patetismo propio de los mon-keigh. ¿Tú qué opinas, proscrita?».

languages.text: “原始的崇拜。毫无意义的争吵。哦对了，还有他们用自己那可悲的猴子方式应对这个世界的滑稽尝试。你怎么看，流浪者？”
languages.original_text: "Primitive cults. Meaningless, pointless squabbling. Oh yes, and some highly amusing attempts to cope with this world in their own pathetic mon-keigh way. What say you, Outcast?"

traits.locale_text: “原始的崇拜。毫无意义的争吵。哦对了，还有他们用自己那可悲的猴子方式应对这个世界的滑稽尝试。你怎么看，流浪者？”
